response: The provided code implements the Knuth-Morris-Pratt (KMP) algorithm for substring search, which efficiently finds the starting index of a specified pattern within a given text. It first constructs a longest prefix-suffix (LPS) array to optimize the search process, allowing the algorithm to skip unnecessary comparisons when a mismatch occurs, thus achieving a linear time complexity of O(n + m), where n is the length of the text and m is the length of the pattern.
